query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.openId, u.role, u.consultorId, u.alunoId, u.isActive, u.cpf, u.programId,
       c.id as cId, c.role as consultorRole, c.managedProgramId, c.isActive as cIsActive
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON u.consultorId = c.id
WHERE u.email IN ('emanoel.querette@embrapii.org.br', 'leandro.rodrigues@embrapii.org.br')
   OR u.name LIKE '%Emanoel%' OR u.name LIKE '%Leandro Rodrigues%'
ORDER BY u.id DESC;
command:

       c.id as cId, c.role as consultorRole, c.managedProgramId, c.isActive as cIsActive
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN consultors c ON u.consultorId = c.id
WHERE u.email IN ('emanoel.querette@embrapii.org.br', 'leandro.rodrigues@embrapii.org.br')
   OR u.name LIKE '%Emanoel%' OR u.name LIKE '%Leandro Rodrigues%'
ORDER BY u.id DESC;
